cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Mr. Hemant Shah?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, yes, this is Hemant. What's this about, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Good morning, Mr. Shah. My name is Rohan and I'm calling from Vistara Miles, the loyalty program of Vistara Airlines. How are you today, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm good, thanks. Busy with some work. What's this about my loyalty program?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, sir. We've noticed that you've accumulated enough points for a free flight upgrade on your next trip. Congratulations, sir!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, great. That sounds good. How do I claim this upgrade, ji?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 39s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.
